iterations.theme: From Childhood Secrets to Motherhood: A Journey of Love and Life
iterations.reason_for_cut: The speaker finishes introducing all her children and their unique qualities, marking a natural transition from her personal history and family background to her deeper spiritual journey and involvement in the pro-life movement.

iterations.theme: Spiritual Journey, Pro-Life Advocacy, and the Power of Acceptance
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers Mihajla's deep spiritual transformation, her active role in the pro-life movement, and her final messages of hope and encouragement, providing a comprehensive conclusion to her story.
